/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AnalyzerUI.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AnalyzerUI.dir/src/CSVParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AnalyzerUI.dir/src/Dashboard.cpp.o -o AnalyzerUI  libimgui_lib.a libimplot_lib.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo libimgui_lib.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework CoreFoundation -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit
